DocumentationFact.Value: --target <sql-identifier> is optional for CREATE VIEW imports, required for bare SELECT imports, and not allowed for TVF or mutation imports.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta-transform-script from sql-code --code "select 1 as A" --name dbo.v_inline --target dbo.TargetTable --new-workspace .\TransformWorkspace
Stored procedure bodies stay as SQL blobs; effects are declared as MetaTransformScript metadata.
Target identifiers are written to ScriptObjectView.TargetSqlIdentifier in the MetaTransformScript workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required when SQL code is bare SELECT or mutation text without a CREATE wrapper.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Add one script to an existing workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Add one script to an existing workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: TSV manifest with a Path column and optional Target column.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Print one progress line per imported file.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Add successful imports to an existing workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Human note stored on the contract.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Declare a result column for a named result rowset.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Inspect one stored procedure transform script by name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Exit successfully even when the pattern updates no target identifiers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Show what would change without saving the workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Skip view scripts that already have a target identifier.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pattern matched against TransformScript.Name. Tokens use {name}.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pattern rendered into TargetSqlIdentifier from captured source tokens.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required when the workspace contains multiple scripts.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.
